description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a predominantly white upper with subtle beige and gold accents. The shoe has a high-top design with a prominent pull tab at the heel and tongue, and a wide elastic strap crossing the midfoot for a secure fit. The side displays the PUMA brand name in gold, while the heel features the PUMA logo on a beige panel. The sole is thick and textured, with a white midsole and a brown, grippy outsole visible at the toe and heel. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic mesh, rubber, and foam for comfort and durability, making it suitable for urban environments.
description: A white and beige high-top athletic shoe with elastic straps, gold PUMA branding, and a thick, textured sole. Designed for comfort and style in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-top silhouette, elastic cross straps, and rounded toe with a brown outsole tip.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gold PUMA branding, beige accent panels, and the thick, ribbed white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the beige heel panel with the white PUMA logo and the pull tab at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the shoe's inner structure, elastic strap placement, and the continuation of the ribbed sole.
attribute_logo: White puma silhouette on beige heel panel; gold PUMA text on side.
